Hero.title: Distribution Center Application
Hero.subtitle: Workplace for DC operators: receive, sort, and hand over goods through staged QR scans.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Hand over orders to couriers or to the next stage.

WhoCanBeHub.title: Who can become a hub
WhoCanBeHub.card1Desc: Premises for receiving and sorting goods.
WhoCanBeHub.card2Desc: Basic equipment and one or more employees.
WhoCanBeHub.card3Desc: All operations are managed through the application.

driver.title: Sign in with phone
driver.description: Enter your number — we'll send a code via Telegram or SMS

dc.title: Sign in with phone
dc.description: Enter your number — we'll send a one-time code

Footer.tagline: Delivery for drivers. Bananay — connecting producers and logistics.

LoginPage.title: Bananay — for drivers
LoginPage.subtitle: Sign in with your phone number

Dashboard.title: Personal account
Dashboard.subtitle: Complete your profile and submit for review.
Dashboard.subtitleActive: Welcome! Complete the daily check-in to start working.

dailyCheckIn.title: Daily Check-in
dailyCheckIn.completedDescription: You're ready to work. Have a great day!
dailyCheckIn.pendingReviewDescription: Your check-in has been submitted. Waiting for approval.
dailyCheckIn.approvedDescription: You're ready to work. Have a great day!

submitHelper.title: Submit your application for review
submitHelper.description: To get started, complete your profile and submit the application. We will review it shortly.
submitHelper.profileStepDesc: Full name, address and payout details.
submitHelper.vehiclesStepDesc: Add at least one vehicle with photo and registration (STS).
submitHelper.documentsStepDesc: Selfie and driver license (front and back).
submitHelper.submitStepDesc: When everything is filled in, click the button at the bottom of the page.

Onboarding.title: Driver registration
Onboarding.subtitle: Fill in your details, add transport and documents, then submit for review.
Onboarding.payoutStubDescription: Here you will be able to add bank account details and a card photo. Coming soon.
Onboarding.submitSuccess: Application submitted. We will review it shortly.
Onboarding.emptyVehicles: No vehicles yet. Add at least one.

DailyCheckIn.title: Daily Check-in
DailyCheckIn.noVehiclesDescription: Add a vehicle in your profile before completing the check-in.
DailyCheckIn.confirmComplete: Confirm to complete the daily check-in.
DailyCheckIn.checkInComplete: Check-in complete! Have a great shift!
DailyCheckIn.alreadyCompletedDescription: You have already completed today's check-in.
DailyCheckIn.pendingReviewDescription: Your check-in has been submitted and is waiting for admin approval.
DailyCheckIn.approvedDescription: You're ready to work. Have a great day!
DailyCheckIn.rejectedDescription: Your check-in was rejected. Please complete it again.

selfie.title: Selfie
selfie.description: Take a clear photo of your face for identity verification.

vehicle_front.title: Vehicle front
vehicle_front.description: Photograph the front of the vehicle with visible plate number.

vehicle_left.title: Left side
vehicle_left.description: Photograph the left side of the vehicle.

vehicle_right.title: Right side
vehicle_right.description: Photograph the right side of the vehicle.

vehicle_rear.title: Vehicle rear
vehicle_rear.description: Photograph the rear of the vehicle.

vehicle_cargo.title: Open cargo
vehicle_cargo.description: Open the cargo area and photograph it.

DeliveryTasks.title: Delivery tasks
DeliveryTasks.subtitle: Pick up goods at the warehouse and deliver to the specified DCs
DeliveryTasks.takeError: Could not take task (maybe already taken)
DeliveryTasks.cancelConfirmDescription: The task will return to the available list and another driver can take it.
DeliveryTasks.noTasksDescription: No delivery orders yet. Check back later.
DeliveryTasks.scanHint: Point the camera at the QR code on the box
DeliveryTasks.scanCameraDenied: Camera access is required to scan
DeliveryTasks.scanTestHint: Paste QR token (UUID) from producer's printed labels to simulate a scan.
DeliveryTasks.scanTestPlaceholder: Paste UUID or link with token

DcLoginPage.title: Bananay - Distribution Center
DcLoginPage.subtitle: Sign in as a DC operator

DcDashboard.title: Distribution Center
DcDashboard.subtitle: Manage item-point processing and scan operations.
DcDashboard.onboardingDescription: Fill first name and last name before starting work.
DcDashboard.awaitingDescription: An administrator must assign your account to a Distribution Center.
DcDashboard.smartScanCardDescription: Scan QR, review status and move to next stage
DcDashboard.smartScanConfirmDescription: Review details and confirm moving to the next status.
DcDashboard.smartScanNotFound: QR not found among available DC operations
DcDashboard.smartScanNoNextAction: No next action is available for this QR
DcDashboard.smartScanTransitionError: Failed to move QR to the next status
DcDashboard.courierHandoverCardDescription: Scan box QR and hand it over to a courier
DcDashboard.currentCardDescription: Scan and move item points through stages
DcDashboard.profileCardDescription: Your name and assigned Distribution Center

DcReceiving.title: Receiving
DcReceiving.subtitle: Pick one order and scan QR codes to receive goods
DcReceiving.emptyDescription: New orders will appear after driver loading and arrival to DC.
DcReceiving.pickOrderHint: For MVP, only one order is processed at a time.
DcReceiving.singleModeHint: Sequential mode: parallel receiving is disabled.
DcReceiving.orderCompleted: Receiving for this order is completed
DcReceiving.completedNextStep: Next step: move accepted items to sorting area (Current operations section).
DcReceiving.scannedEmpty: No scanned QR codes in this session yet.

DcProfile.title: Profile
DcProfile.subtitle: Your operator information
DcProfile.nameRequired: Please fill first and last name

DcCurrent.title: Current operations
DcCurrent.subtitle: Active item points ready for next stage
DcCurrent.errorLoading: Failed to load active item points
DcCurrent.emptyDescription: All scanned item points will appear here until handover.

scan.title: Scan QR code
scan.hint: Point camera at item-point QR token
scan.cameraDenied: Camera access is required to scan
scan.testHint: Paste QR token (UUID) to emulate scanning.
scan.testPlaceholder: Paste UUID or URL with token

DcHistory.title: History
DcHistory.subtitle: Order history by processing stage

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search: order, QR, SKU, point, worker

DcHistory.placeholderDescription: This tab is empty for now, data will appear soon.
DcHistory.emptyReceivedDescription: Received orders will appear here after first receiving scans.
DcHistory.emptyFilteredDescription: Adjust search/filter settings or reset filters.
DcHistory.emptyStageDescription: Scanned boxes for the selected stage will appear here.
DcHistory.receivedTabHint: Receiving breakdown for each order line.
DcHistory.emptyDeliveredDescription: Delivered orders will appear here after courier confirms delivery to the final point.

CourierHandover.title: Courier handover
CourierHandover.subtitle: Scan box QR to hand it over to a courier
CourierHandover.confirmDescription: Make sure the courier in front of you matches the details below.
CourierHandover.errorNotFound: Box not found or no courier assigned
CourierHandover.doneDescription: Box handed to courier. Order is on its way to the recipient.
